signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, aimed at reducing Solana transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, was confirmed via a governance vote with 98.27% in favor, positioning Solana as a faster execution layer amid strong network activity like $57B DEX volume in March.[3] This resolution could shift prediction ma
